research_basis: Google SRE postmortems capture trigger, root cause, impact, mitigation, and follow-up actions to prevent recurrence.
Google SRE postmortem analysis uses consistent root-cause categories to target systemic fixes.
OpenTelemetry error conventions record exception/error attributes on failing spans.
rules: Every failure class must include category, trigger, symptom, severity, evidence refs, recurrence risk, and owner.
Every failure class must have root-cause analysis with at least three why steps and a preventive change.
Every failure class must have at least one repair route.
S4 critical failures require a blocking route.
Action items require owner, priority, and done definition.
